description: Create the API client module (qi-webapp/js/api.js) and add mode switching to the store (qi-webapp/js/store.js). This feature creates the foundational API layer and store mode logic that the UI features depend on.
steps: Create qi-webapp/js/api.js as an IIFE that exposes window.QIAPI (similar pattern to store.js). Include: API.register(email, password, displayName), API.login(email, password, mfaToken?), API.logout(), API.me(), API.listCases(projectId?), API.getCase(id), API.createCase(data), API.updateCase(id, data), API.deleteCase(id). All requests use credentials:'include'. Base URL from window.QI_API_URL || ''. All methods return { ok, data, error } normalized response objects.

Add mode switching to qi-webapp/js/store.js: Add a QIStore.setMode('local'|'api') function and QIStore.getMode() function. Store mode in localStorage under key 'qi_mode'. Default to 'local'. When mode='api', the addCase/updateCase/deleteCase functions should call the API module AND update local state from the response. Keep the existing localStorage behavior as fallback.
Add the api.js script tag to qi-webapp/index.html AFTER store.js and BEFORE ui.js: <script src="js/api.js"></script>

Create qi-webapp/api.test.js that tests the API module's request shaping with a mock fetch (no real server). Verify: correct URLs, methods, headers, body serialization, credentials:'include', error normalization. Use the same pattern as test.js (simple console.log assertions, process.exit(1) on failure).
acceptance_criteria: qi-webapp/js/api.js exists and exposes window.QIAPI with all 9 methods
Each API method sends fetch with credentials:'include' and correct HTTP method/URL
Responses are normalized to { ok: boolean, data: any, error: string|null }
Base URL is configurable via window.QI_API_URL (defaults to '')
QIStore.setMode('api') switches mode, QIStore.getMode() returns current mode
Default mode is 'local' so existing tests pass unchanged
When mode='api', addCase/updateCase/deleteCase proxy through QIAPI
Existing smoke.js (209 tests) and test.js (7 suites) still pass
verification: Run 'node smoke.js' in qi-webapp/ and confirm ALL SMOKE TESTS PASSED
Run 'node test.js' in qi-webapp/ and confirm all suites PASS
Run 'node api.test.js' in qi-webapp/ and confirm it passes
